---
name: Feature
about: Propose a new capability or structural improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Why

Explain the problem this solves.

## Scope

Define what is included and what is out of scope.

## Impact

Explain which documents, workflows, or layers are affected.

## Proposed Sprint Goal

State the goal this work should achieve.
